perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female creator with her hair in a bun and wearing a light blue shirt over a white top stands in a modern kitchen, gesturing energetically towards the camera. (2) Close-up shots of cooking actions: pouring olive oil into a pan, stir-frying sliced onions, boiling instant noodles, and pouring out excess water into a glass measuring cup. (3) The creator adds sauce packets, the fried onions, and a slice of cheese into the noodles, stirring them with a spatula. (4) The noodles are plated in a red dish, topped with a raw egg yolk, seaweed flakes, and a generous amount of mayonnaise squeezed in a zigzag pattern. (5) The creator sits down to eat, using chopsticks to mix the toppings and taking large, enthusiastic bites. (6) She expresses various reactions, from surprise at the spice to satisfaction with the flavor, occasionally showing close-ups of the food and her drinking from a glass of iced soda.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic background music starts. A clear female voice speaks in an enthusiastic and friendly tone, introducing the recipe. (2) Sizzling sounds of onions frying in oil are audible, layered over the continuous BGM. (3) Sound effects like a soft 'pop' occur during text transitions. (4) The sound of liquid pouring and bubbles fizzing is heard as she pours soda into a glass. (5) Prominent slurping and chewing sounds (ASMR-style) are heard while she eats the noodles. (6) The video ends with a cheerful closing remark and a final beat of the music.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '步骤 1- 橄榄油炒洋葱' (Step 1 - Stir-fry onions with olive oil), '步骤 2- 煮两包辣鸡面' (Step 2 - Boil two packs of spicy chicken noodles), through to '步骤 9- 加美乃滋' (Step 9 - Add mayonnaise). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '\裁瑛PD的神级辣鸡面/' (Na-PD's God-tier Spicy Chicken Noodle), '好期待哦' (So looking forward to it), '哇哇' (Wow wow), '入口就很滑顺' (Smooth upon entry). (3) Subtitles translate the creator's commentary throughout the video in a casual, vlog-like tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Cooking Tutorial -> Tasting and Reaction -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing in front of the camera and performing the cooking/eating.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair tied in a high bun, wearing a light blue oversized button-down shirt over a white crop top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with dark cabinetry, a white countertop, an induction stove, and a range hood. Various kitchen utensils and glass lids are visible in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights, bright and even.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Demo -> Taste Test -> Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an engaging and easy-to-follow cooking tutorial for a popular variation of Buldak spicy noodles (attributed to Na Young-seok PD), while also entertaining the audience with a 'mukbang' style reaction and review of the final dish.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear and frequent display of the Buldak noodle brand packaging and the use of the brand name in a recipe context.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style editing with large, colorful text overlays and emojis.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines the 'how-to' tutorial format with the 'mukbang' reaction format to maximize engagement. The production quality is high, with clear lighting and beat-synced editing.
